title: Learning Pathway for Design of Experiments & ANOVA
description: A flowchart illustrating the recommended sequence of learning resources and activities for mastering the module's concepts.
relationships: Start with Foundational Reading to establish base knowledge, proceed to Video Lectures for visual explanation, then use the Interactive Simulator to explore outcomes. Solidify understanding with Practice Problems and apply concepts to a Case Study. Engage with the Discussion Forum for collaborative learning, culminating in a Final Project to demonstrate mastery.
